content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach opens with a precise read on the 'slight smile' — naming what was shown rather than what was said, and inquiring into whether it carried sadness underneath. This is a textbook AoA read of the said-vs-shown distinction, and it cracks the conversation open immediately. The coach then tracks somatic state explicitly ('what does it feel like in your body right now') at exactly the moment the client mentions missing the flow. In turn 8 the coach names the client's framework-reaching pattern operatively ('you did. And you caught it') — this is reading the intellectual-question-with-emotional-body pattern in real time, distinguishing the part of the client wanting to stay with feeling from the part reaching for IFS vocabulary. Turn 12 ('There it is') is a timely read marking the moment of truth-telling, followed by inquiry into what it's like — read precedes question. Reads are specific, somatic/linguistic, and consistently timed at the moments they change the conversation rather than after.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 8, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Specific read of the 'slight smile' — names what was shown, distinguishes said from shown, inquires into whether it carries sadness. Read precedes question."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Somatic tracking question at the precise moment the client said 'I miss it' — directs attention to the body where the feeling actually lives."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Intervention more than read; doesn't name a new read but holds the somatic territory already opened."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the framework-reaching pattern operatively ('you did. And you caught it') — reads the intellectual-grab without using AoA jargon, distinguishes the part wanting to stay from the part explaining."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Inquiry into the discomfort; tracks the live edge but doesn't name a fresh read."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'There it is' — timely read marking the moment of truth, followed by inquiry into what it's like to have said it. Read precedes question."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Minimal intervention that honors the awareness layer surfacing; no explicit read named."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "The coach never explicitly asks the 'what's you?' awareness-locating question, but reads the said-vs-shown gap and the framework-grabbing pattern accurately enough that the client locates the awareness layer themselves. On reads specifically, this is strong work — specific, somatic, timely, and the reads consistently precede questions."
}
